title: Quality Advancements
description: This datapack/mod adds in new advancements for you to earn.
body:
# Quality Advancements

This datapack/mod actively adds in **_19_** new advancements to the game.

<details>
<summary>Advancements/Information (Please Look):</summary>

* **All Aboard!**
    * **Description:** "Travel a total of 5,000 blocks in a boat."
    * **Frame:** Goal
    * **Icon:** Oak Boat
* **Beneath the Ice**
    * **Description:** "Travel 1,000 blocks while riding a boat over Blue Ice."
    * **Frame:** Goal
    * **Icon:** Blue Ice
* **The Floor is Lava**
    * **Description:** "Stand on a Magma Block for 10 seconds while having the Fire Resistance effect."
    * **Frame:** Task
    * **Icon:** Magma Block
* **Overpowered**
    * **Description:** "Have every beneficial potion effect on you simultaneously."
    * **Frame:** Challenge
    * **Icon:** Golden Apple
* **Prolonged Eye Contact**
    * **Description:** "Look an Enderman directly in the eye while wearing a carved pumpkin."
    * **Frame:** Challenge
    * **Icon:** Carved Pumpkin
* **A Daring Operation**
    * **Description:** "Kill a Creeper using only Flint and Steel (by igniting it before it explodes)."
    * **Frame:** Challenge
    * **Icon:** Flint and Steel
* **Seriously?**
    * **Description:** "Die from a falling Anvil that you personally dropped."
    * **Frame:** Challenge
    * **Icon:** Chipped Anvil
* **The Unintentional Tower**
    * **Description:** "Fall from a height of at least 10 blocks and survive."
    * **Frame:** Challenge
    * **Icon:** Ladder
*  **Fire Starter**
    * **Description:** "Place a Torch deep underground (Y=50 or below)."
    * **Frame:** Task
    * **Icon:** Torch
*  **Night's Respite**
    * **Description:** "Place a Bed and sleep in it for the night."
    * **Frame:** Task
    * **Icon:** Red Bed
*  **Sustained Living**
    * **Description:** "Obtain Wheat, Carrots, and Potatoes."
    * **Frame:** Goal
    * **Icon:** Wheat
*  **Acquire Shiny!**
    * **Description:** "Smelt Raw Iron into a usable ingot."
    * **Frame:** Task
    * **Icon:** Iron Ingot
*   **Fortune Favors the Bold**
    * **Description:** "Mine a Diamond using a pickaxe enchanted with Fortune."
    * **Frame:** Challenge 
    * **Icon:** Diamond
*   **Creeper Containment**
    * **Description:** "Survive an explosion from a Creeper."
    * **Frame:** Challenge
    * **Icon:** Gunpowder 
*   **A Bare Handed Start**
    * **Description:** "Obtain your first wooden plank."
    * **Frame:** Task
    * **Icon:** Oak Planks
*   **Pre-stone Age**
    * **Description:** "Craft your first tool from wood."
    * **Frame:** Task
    * **Icon:** Wooden Pickaxe
*   **Portable Ocean**
    * **Description:** "Collect a water source in a Bucket."
    * **Frame:** Goal
    * **Icon:** Water Bucket
*   **It's Raining Slime**
    * **Description:** "Defeat a Slime in a swamp biome."
    * **Frame:** Task
    * **Icon:** Slimeball 
*   **Portable Ocean**
    * **Description:** "Collect a lava source in a Bucket."
    * **Frame:** Goal
    * **Icon:** Lava Bucket 
  (To be honest, I only added this one for further parody, and as an excuse for a mini-update)
  
</details>

<details>
<summary>Terms of Use (All Rights Reserved to NightMareLore, but available usage listed here):</summary>

Resource Pack Terms of Use (for "Quality Advancements")

### Legal Disclaimer

The code contained in "Quality Advancements" are the original work of NightMareLore and are protected by copyright. By downloading and using this pack, you agree to the following terms.

---

### You MAY Do The Following: (Permissions)

1. Use in Content: You may use this resource pack in videos, live streams, screenshots, and other public content (including content that is monetized).
2. Private Editing: You may modify, edit, or remix any assets in this pack for your own personal, private use.
3. Server Use: You may install this pack on a server and require players to use it, provided the pack file itself is NOT hosted on the server—players must download it from the official source link (CurseForge/Modrinth/etc.).
4. Creation of Add-ons: You may create and distribute separate packs that are designed to be compatible with, or require, "Quality Advancements."
5. Media Creation & Sale: You may create and sell media (such as drawings, paintings, prints, or digital art) featuring the unique appearance of mobs/entities from this resource pack, provided you include proper attribution to NightMareLore and send an email notification to nightmarelore.10@gmail.com informing me of your project.

---

### You MAY NOT Do The Following: (Restrictions)

1. Re-upload/Redistribution: You may NOT re-upload, share, or redistribute the pack file itself (or any unedited part of the file) on any other website, forum, or hosting service. Always link directly to the official download page (CurseForge/Modrinth/etc.).
2. Inclusion of Unedited Code: You may NOT include any unedited or recognizable assets (models, textures, or code) from this pack within any other publicly distributed resource pack, mod, or project without explicit written permission from NightMareLore.
3. Porting: You may NOT port this pack or its assets to other game editions (such as Minecraft Bedrock Edition) or other games without explicit written permission.
4. Direct Sales/NFTs: You may NOT sell this resource pack or any of its individual assets, or use them in any NFT/cryptocurrency-related project, paid product, or paid service.

---

### Attribution Requirement

When using this pack in public content (videos, streams, etc.), you are required to provide clear and visible credit to the creator, NightMareLore, and include a direct link to the official download page in the description of your content.

</details>
   
### Several Minecraft versions
It works for Minecraft versions 1.21.x (and likely further). Be aware that in most versions, a warning may appear that it is for the wrong version, but for some older versions, it may work.

## Created by NightML, aka NightMareLore. 

Taking suggestions for resourcepacks via email: nightmarelore.10@gmail.com

Please enjoy! But, don't feel inclined to download it, if it isn't your style.
Though there is no active content, music videos will be eventually uploaded to **@NightMareLore10** on YouTube. [Please subscribe for more updates - completely free!]

## Will Likely Update Fairly Often (as of October 23, 2025)

P.S. I try my very best to ensure that all of my content is family friendly and respectful to all culture, race, religion, and other personal factors. If anyone at any point finds something to be disrespectful or non-family friendly, then you can contact me at nightmarelore.10@gmail.com. If I personally find that my content is disrespectful in any manner, then I will **_IMMEDIATELY_** change it to ensure that my community is a safe, kind, healthy, and supportive one!
